Fraud Alert System

Emergency Helpline

Scam Categories

Identify the most common digital threats and learn how to spot them before they strike.

UPI Fraud

Fake payment requests and QR code scams targeting digital wallets.

Phishing Attacks

Deceptive emails and websites designed to steal sensitive credentials.

OTP Scams

Social engineering tactics to trick users into sharing one-time passwords.

Fake Job Offers

Fraudulent recruitment schemes promising high pay for minimal work.

Investment & Crypto

High-return promises in fake trading platforms and crypto tokens.

Social Media Fraud

Impersonation, account takeovers, and romance-based scams.

Identity Theft

Stealing personal data to commit fraud or open unauthorized accounts.

Loan App Fraud

Predatory lending apps with hidden charges and harassment tactics.

Experimental Lab

Scam Simulation Lab

Step into our controlled environment where you can experience and identify cyber attacks without the risk. Our interactive modules prepare you for real-world scenarios.

Interactive

Email Detection Demo

Can you spot the phishing attempt? Analyze headers and links in real-time.

Simulation

Phishing Simulator

Experience a simulated attack to understand how hackers manipulate emotions.

Assessment

Awareness Quiz

Test your knowledge on the latest cyber threats and earn your safety badge.

AI Powered

AI Fraud Assistant

Our AI analyzes suspicious messages to determine the probability of fraud.

Prevention is Better Than Cure

Prevention Toolkit

Equip yourself with our suite of security tools designed to keep you one step ahead of cyber criminals.

Password Strength Checker

Analyze your password's entropy and crack-time against brute-force attacks.

URL Scanner

Instantly verify if a link is safe or leads to a known phishing domain.

Email Phishing Detector

Upload suspicious email headers to identify spoofing and malicious origins.

Cyber Hygiene Checklist

A step-by-step guide to securing your digital footprint and accounts.

Latest Fraud Alerts

Stay updated with the most recent threats identified by our security team.

Government WarningHigh

New 'Electricity Bill' SMS Scam Circulating

Fraudsters are sending fake disconnection notices to trick users into downloading malicious APK files.

Oct 24, 2023
Trending FraudCritical

Fake AI-Generated Investment Ads on Social Media

Deepfake videos of celebrities promoting high-return crypto schemes are being reported across platforms.

Oct 22, 2023
Recent AlertMedium

UPI 'Refund' Request Scam Targeting E-commerce Users

Scammers posing as customer support are sending 'Collect' requests disguised as refunds.

Oct 20, 2023
Emergency Protocol

BEING SCAMMED
RIGHT NOW?

Every second counts. Follow these steps immediately to minimize damage and secure your assets.

Call 1930

Call 1930

National Cyber Crime Helpline (India)

Block Bank Card

Call your bank or use mobile app instantly

Cyber Portal

File a complaint at cybercrime.gov.in

Save Evidence

Take screenshots of chats and transactions

Our Mission

To create a fraud-free digital India through awareness and technology. We believe that the strongest firewall is an informed user. LOCKHIVE is dedicated to bridging the gap between complex cyber threats and everyday digital safety.

Our Vision

A secure digital ecosystem where every citizen can transact and communicate without fear of exploitation.

Our Goal

To reduce digital fraud incidents by 50% through proactive education and real-time threat intelligence.

LOCKHIVE

Empowering citizens with the knowledge and tools to navigate the digital world safely. Stay aware, stay secure.
